GUEST SWIPE FILE
Watch and learn as Grant appears on a wide range of top podcasts.
Grant comes in with a fun energy and immediately starts telling a personal story that
ties into sales, closing the deal with Elena. Grant related with Logan Paul on his
ability to market and tied in a story to give himself credibility (selling out Marlin
Stadium). It was a great interview that stayed lighthearted and showed a lot of
credibility and humility.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf1
#1 	Impaulsive with Logan Paul
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

This show was booked specifically to promote Undercover Billionaire. He did a great
job of promoting the show in a fun way, without too much hype. Dennis also brought
up the 10X Rule very quickly. Additionally, Grant gave some classic lessons, like how
he does not believe in diversification. It was a very witty and intellectual conversation.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf2
#2 	Dennis Miller +1
This was also for promotion for Undercover Billionaire. Adam dug down on the
specifics of the show, allowing Grant to go deep into the story. He hit hard on several
points including “go to zero”, the importance of networking, creating partnerships,
etc. Adam related, especially in showing up and proving value before getting paid.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf3
#3 	Adam Carolla Show
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

#4 	Earn Your Leisure
This was the 5th time that Grant appeared on the show, and it was the one that
got by far the most listens and views. Notice how the host Lewis starts the show
with a cliff hanger and then immediately pulls valuable information for his guests.
Grant did a great job throughout this interview, mixing in life lessons and subtle
self promotions.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf5
#5 	School of Greatness
Grant created an immediate rapport with the hosts by showing support for what
they do. Throughout the show Grant dropped knowledge the entire time. He shared
a real world personal story about his dad dying early, which created a connection
with the audience. This is a great episode to listen to in order to learn Grant’s
financial outlook.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf4
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
